intro: Peripleura diffusa, also known as P. diffusa or Khat, is a flowering plant native to the Horn of Africa and the Arabian Peninsula, belonging to the Celastraceae family. The health benefits of P. diffusa include its ability to increase alertness and energy, as well as its potential to aid in the management of fatigue, stress, and anxiety. The bioactive constituents of P. diffusa include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, P. diffusa is used to make tea, infusions, and chewing sticks, which are the most common herbal preparations made with this plant.
